projects.title: InstantPortfolio: AI-Powered Portfolio Generator
description: Designed and deployed a FastAPI backend that parses resumes and generates structured portfolio data using OpenAI APIs.
Implemented request validation, endpoint orchestration, and service integration for reliable profile generation workflows.

projects.title: AI-Powered Classification of German Business Documents
description: Built a Transformer-powered classification service with a FastAPI inference layer for business document labeling.
Implemented REST endpoints for real-time predictions with structured response schemas and confidence scores.
Integrated preprocessing, model serving, and API response handling for production-ready inference.

projects.title: Statistical Visualization of Lotto 6/49 (Shiny App)
description: Developed server-side R Shiny logic to process historical Lotto 6/49 datasets and return interactive analytics.
Implemented reusable data transformation pipelines and reactive filtering for fast chart updates.

experience.title: Early Clinical Biostatistics
tasks: Designed and delivered an R Shiny application with modular server-side logic for clinical study analysis.
Implemented Bayesian, frequentist, and multivariate analysis workflows as reusable computation modules.
Built reliable data-processing and reactive pipelines to support consistent analytics delivery for study teams.

experience.title: AI & Deep Learning
tasks: Developed automated ML workflows with Netflix Metaflow for reproducible training and inference runs.
Designed scalable data and feature pipelines using RDKit, Scikit-learn, and PyTorch.
Implemented model-serving components for molecular property prediction in production-oriented workflows.

experience.title: Data Analyst
tasks: Built analysis pipelines to identify and prioritize insulin production bottlenecks.
Developed reproducible reporting dashboards in Python to support data-driven operational decisions.
Applied advanced statistical methods to improve process efficiency and production reliability.

experience.title: Software Developer
tasks: Extended a Flask-based application backend and service endpoints for scientific visualization workflows.
Implemented multi-threaded processing and optimized database queries to improve service throughput.
Reduced API latency through indexing strategy and query-plan optimization.
